ayahs.arabic: الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Alif, Lām, Rā.[668] These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahs.arabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rubama yawaddu allatheenakafaroo law kanoo muslimeen
ayahs.translation: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish[669] that they had been Muslims.

ayahs.arabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Tharhum ya/kuloo wayatamattaAAoowayulhihimu al-amalu fasawfa yaAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illawalaha kitabun maAAloom
ayahs.translation: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.

ayahs.arabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalahawama yasta/khiroon
ayahs.translation: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ya ayyuha allatheenuzzila AAalayhi aththikru innaka lamajnoon
ayahs.translation: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.[670]

ayahs.arabic: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law ma ta/teena bilmala-ikatiin kunta mina assadiqeen
ayahs.translation: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"

ayahs.arabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma nunazzilu almala-ikata illabilhaqqi wama kanoo ithan munthareen
ayahs.translation: We do not send down the angels except with truth;[671] and they [i.e., the disbelievers] would not then be reprieved.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَـٰفِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalna aththikrawa-inna lahu lahafithoon
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who sent down the message [i.e., the Qur’ān], and indeed, We will be its guardian.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad arsalna min qablika feeshiyaAAi al-awwaleen
ayahs.translation: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muḥammad], among the sects of the former peoples.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ya/teehim min rasoolin illakanoo bihi yastahzi-oon
ayahs.translation: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Thus do We insert it [i.e., denial] into the hearts of the criminals.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yu/minoona bihi waqad khalatsunnatu al-awwaleen
ayahs.translation: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw fatahna AAalayhim babanmina assama-i fathalloo feehiyaAArujoon
ayahs.translation: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,

ayahs.arabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَـٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqaloo innama sukkirat absarunabal nahnu qawmun mashooroon
ayahs.translation: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad jaAAalna fee assama-iburoojan wazayyannaha linnathireen
ayahs.translation: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَفِظْنَـٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allāh]

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa mani istaraqa assamAAafaatbaAAahu shihabun mubeen
ayahs.translation: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wal-arda madadnahawaalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatnafeeha min kulli shay-in mawzoon
ayahs.translation: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَـٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna lakum feeha maAAayishawaman lastum lahu biraziqeen
ayahs.translation: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.[672]

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-in min shay-in illa AAindanakhaza-inuhu wama nunazziluhu illa biqadarinmaAAloom
ayahs.translation: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known [i.e., specified] measure.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَـٰزِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waarsalna arriyaha lawaqihafaanzalna mina assama-i maanfaasqaynakumoohu wama antum lahu bikhazineen
ayahs.translation: And We have sent the fertilizing winds[673] and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.[674]

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad AAalimna almustaqdimeenaminkum walaqad AAalimna almusta/khireen
ayahs.translation: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna rabbaka huwa yahshuruhuminnahu hakeemun AAaleem
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna al-insana minsalsalin min hama-in masnoon
ayahs.translation: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waljanna khalaqnahumin qablu min nari assamoom
ayahs.translation: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَـٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ith qala rabbuka lilmala-ikatiinnee khaliqun basharan min salsalin min hama-inmasnoon
ayahs.translation: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-itha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehimin roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideen
ayahs.translation: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul,[675] then fall down to him in prostration."

ayahs.arabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa ibleesa aba an yakoonamaAAa assajideen
ayahs.translation: Except Iblees;[676] he refused to be with those who prostrated.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya ibleesu ma lakaalla takoona maAAa assajideen
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lam akun li-asjuda libasharinkhalaqtahu min salsalin min hama-in masnoon
ayahs.translation: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "Then depart from it,[677] for indeed, you are expelled.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

ayahs.arabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
ayahs.translation: Until the Day of the time well-known."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi bima aghwaytaneelaozayyinanna lahum fee al-ardi walaoghwiyannahumajmaAAeen
ayahs.translation: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them [i.e., mankind] on earth, and I will mislead them all

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
ayahs.translation: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna AAibadee laysa laka AAalayhimsultanun illa mani ittabaAAaka mina alghaween
ayahs.translation: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.

ayahs.arabic: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَّقْسُومٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Laha sabAAatu abwabin likullibabin minhum juz-on maqsoom
ayahs.translation: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them [i.e., Satan's followers] a portion designated."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs,

ayahs.arabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WanazaAAna ma fee sudoorihimmin ghillin ikhwanan AAala sururin mutaqabileen
ayahs.translation: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment,[678] [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yamassuhum feeha nasabunwama hum minha bimukhrajeen
ayahs.translation: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.translation: [O Muḥammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful,

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
ayahs.translation: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
ayahs.translation: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloosalaman qala inna minkum wajiloon
ayahs.translation: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful [i.e., apprehensive] of you."

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la tawjal innanubashshiruka bighulamin AAaleem
ayahs.translation: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala abashshartumoonee AAalaan massaniya alkibaru fabima tubashshiroon
ayahs.translation: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِطِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bashsharnaka bilhaqqifala takun mina alqaniteen
ayahs.translation: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala waman yaqnatu min rahmatirabbihi illa addalloon
ayahs.translation: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Except his wife." We [i.e., Allāh] decreed that she is of those who remain behind.[679]

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَـٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bal ji/naka bimakanoo feehi yamtaroon
ayahs.translation: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,

ayahs.arabic: وَأَتَيْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَـٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faasri bi-ahlika biqitAAin minaallayli wattabiAA adbarahum wala yaltafitminkum ahadun wamdoo haythutu/maroon
ayahs.translation: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

ayahs.arabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqadayna ilayhi thalikaal-amra anna dabira haola-i maqtooAAunmusbiheen
ayahs.translation: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And the people of the city came rejoicing.[680]

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
ayahs.translation: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
ayahs.translation: And fear Allāh and do not disgrace me."

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo awa lam nanhaka AAani alAAalameen
ayahs.translation: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters[681] - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."

ayahs.arabic: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahs.translation: By your life, [O Muḥammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: So the shriek[682] seized them at sunrise.

ayahs.arabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عَـٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahs.transliteration: FajaAAalna AAaliyaha safilahawaamtarna AAalayhim hijaratan minsijjeel
ayahs.translation: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, they [i.e., those cities] are [situated] on an established road.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] were [also] wrongdoers,

ayahs.arabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.translation: And certainly did the companions of al-Ḥijr[683] [i.e., the Thamūd] deny the messengers.

ayahs.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
ayahs.translation: But the shriek seized them at early morning,

ayahs.arabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَـَٔاتِيَةٌ ۖ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma illabilhaqqi wa-inna assaAAata laatiyatunfasfahi assafhaaljameel
ayahs.translation: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad ataynaka sabAAan minaalmathanee walqur-ana alAAatheem
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly given you, [O Muḥammad], seven of the often repeated [verses][684] and the great Qur’ān.

ayahs.arabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La tamuddanna AAaynayka ila mamattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum wala tahzanAAalayhim wakhfid janahaka lilmu/mineen
ayahs.translation: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of them [i.e., the disbelievers], and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to the believers.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahs.translation: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -

ayahs.arabic: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators[685]

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahs.translation: Who have made the Qur’ān into portions.[686]

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all

ayahs.arabic: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: About what they used to do.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then declare what you are commanded[687] and turn away from the polytheists.[688]

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yajAAaloona maAAa Allahiilahan akhara fasawfa yaAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: Who make [equal] with Allāh another deity. But they are going to know.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad naAAlamu annaka yadeequ sadrukabima yaqooloon
ayahs.translation: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.translation: So exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].

ayahs.arabic: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
ayahs.translation: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty [i.e., death].
